title: Al-Amin Sends 'Abd al-Rahman b. Jabalah to Fight Tahir
description: to Fight Tdhir In this year, Muhammad the Deposed"" sent `Abd al-Rahman b. Jabalah al-Abnawi to Hamadhan to fight Tahir.'0 According to `Abdallah b. $alih: When news that All b. `Isa b. Mahan had been killed and that Tahir had extirpated his army reached Muhammad, he dispatched `Abd al-Rahman 18271 al-Abnawi with z,o,ooo men from the Abnd'.331 He sent money with him, strengthened him with weapons and horses, gave him gifts, and appointed him governor of Hulwan in addition to whatever territory of Khurasan he might conquer.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
